fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: SLV, the iShares Silver ETF, is facing scrutiny after a significant 35% decline, prompting analysis of its future prospects. Separately, Selvita reported its Q1 2026 results and initiated a review of its strategic options, though the direct impact on SLV is unclear from this information alone.

headlines.title: Should You Buy the iShares Silver ETF After Its 35% Plunge? Here's What Could Happen Next.
Selvita reports Q1 2026 results and launches strategic options review

examples.body: $SLV my friend has bought at 109$. So any price below $109 is buy for me. Added 1k shares at 68.75. I usually sell covered calls, but not at this time.
$MU $SLV $QQQ Anyone remember the day Silver went to 110 then 69 one day later.......yeah, I do!
The One Signal That Matters For #Gold And #Silver Right Now $GLD $SLV https://talkmarkets.com/article/the-one-signal-that-matters-for-gold-and-silver-right-now…
